title: Chorus Honey
description: Mix Chorus Fruit and Honey to ascend to new heights!
body:
Mix Chorus Fruit and Honey to ascend to new heights!
--- Adds two items to the game: **Chorus Honey** - This mysterious end concoction contains the power of chorus! - Brewed with a chorus fruit and honey bottles at a brewing stand - When consumed, teleports the player to the nearest open space above **Chorus Honey Block** - Like honey, but flows up! - Airborne entities slide up the block on contact - Crafted with 4 chorus honey bottles --- This is a standalone port of Chorus Honey from [Pollinators Paradise](https://modrinth.com/mod/pollinators-paradise).
